backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a paste-sharing backend with paste creation, retrieval, expiration, password protection, user profiles, and legacy ID compatibility, using blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix for the 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files' error, listing the affected frontend files and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, hook, utility, and page in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React frontend, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing hash-based routing to render CreatePastePage, HistoryPage, or PasteViewPage, wrapped in theme, query, and toast providers.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared page layout providing a sticky header with logo, conditional History link for authenticated users, login button, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component supporting expired, not-found, and generic error states, optionally showing the paste ID and additional diagnostic details.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading state and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/PasteEditModal.t: A modal dialog component for editing an existing paste, allowing users to modify text content, add/remove files, change the password, and extend expiration, with file upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: A UI component that displays file upload progress, showing the current file index, filename, and a progress bar with percentage.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Exports constants defining the maximum file size limit (50MB) in both MB and bytes for paste uploads.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using TanStack Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for paste CRUD operations (create, get, edit, delete, extend expiration, get password), including file upload with progress callbacks via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and shared card component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: The main page for creating a new paste, with a form for text input, file uploads, password protection, and expiration selection, displaying a shareable URL upon successful creation.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a user's paste history with loading/error/empty states, and supports editing pastes via a modal. Requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Renders a single paste by ID with support for file downloads, owner badge, remaining time, and typed error states (expired, not-found, generic).
frontend/src/utils/actorFactory.ts: Provides factory functions to create anonymous or authenticated ICP backend actors, avoiding the double-configuration agent warning.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes various backend error types into user-friendly messages and flags whether the error is authentication-related.
frontend/src/utils/draftEditorDiagnostic: Suppresses non-blocking 'draft-editor:error disallowed origin' console warnings injected by the Caffeine hosting platform's preview tooling.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Provides utilities to compute safe download filenames from MIME types and to trigger browser downloads from ExternalBlob data.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts a nanosecond bigint duration into a human-readable string with minute granularity (e.g., '1 hr 10 min', '3 days').
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Provides validation, normalization, and extraction utilities for paste IDs, supporting both legacy numeric and GUID formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a pastebin/file-upload app, tracking the current known issue of an 'Unauthorized: Only logged-in users can upload files' production error and the fix request targeting backend auth guard and frontend actor initialization.
